feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /b/ Random: Monarch Season 2 - Anyone Watch this Show?
entry.content: Half way through the show, and holy hell how infuriating of a character the main jap is. I wish she would just get eaten already. I am also fucking sick of shows that do flash backs every since the fucking Arrow show. I honestly just skip the past scenes. I don't give a fuck. Maybe film the past as a season, then the present stuff as a second season. God I just want gozilla to curb stomp everyone

entry.title: /int/ International: Even up until the 1800s, the average height of actual samurai was only around 14…
entry.content: Even up until the 1800s, the average height of actual samurai was only around 140 cm, and there are real photos of samurai taken in the 1900s that prove this. The samurai depicted in movies and games are pure fiction. While Japanese people take pride in their Jomon DNA, the reality is that their genetics are closer to indigenous Filipinos, making them nothing more than sea monkeys

entry.title: /o/ Auto: I just got my motorcycle permit, but I’m not interested in riding a traditional …
entry.content: I just got my motorcycle permit, but I’m not interested in riding a traditional motorcycle. Instead, I’m looking at getting a 125cc–200cc scooter or moped for getting around town. They’re fuel-efficient, and I like the idea of being outside rather than sitting in a hot car in traffic. I live in the city and don’t expect to do any highway riding. I don't mind going down calmer backroads if I need to travel far. With that in mind, which should I go with? I am only 5'2. A dealership near me sells u

entry.title: /g/ Technology: DarkWeb
entry.content: Do you regularly browse .onion or .I2P sites? What's your favorite? The only one I regularly use is hiddenbooru on I2P and I want to expand my horizons. Note that this thread isn't for illegal stuff obviously.

entry.title: /mu/ Music: ITT: Dubs decides what albums i listen to
entry.content: Post an album, if you get dubs/trips etc. i will listen to it in its entirety and rate the tracks based on how much i liked them. it can be any album that doesn't exceed 1h 30m. i will not listen to shills or anything posted by the bot if it starts spamming the thread

entry.title: /g/ Technology: /aicg/ - A general dedicated to the discussion and development of AI chatbots. G…
entry.content: /aicg/ - A general dedicated to the discussion and development of AI chatbots. GLM Edition >The BotBrowser extension for SillyTavern has been confirmed to be a trojan that steals API keys. You should remove the extension and consider rotating your API keys if you've used it. Details: https://rentry.co/st-backdoor The StructuredPrefill extension by the same author is suspected to be compromised too, so using it is not recommended either. >News Z.ai releases GLM 5.2: https://z.ai/blog/glm-5.2 Mini

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Is going to the track the only way to really enjoy a performance car?
entry.content: I have an M340i. It's fast and I love the way it handles and girls like it, but I can't even really step on it without instantly blowing the cucked speed limits in my area. I got pulled over for going 20 over a few weeks ago. Should I have just gotten a plush, slow, Mercedes sort of ride instead? What's the fucking point when you have to share the road with people who should be legally classified as fauna and follow rules meant to keep them from accidentally killing themselves and others?

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Public Announcement
entry.content: Telemarketers will be fined by the FCC if your phone is called while registered on the national do not call registry. https://www.donotcall.gov/ >the above site is for US residents >most western nations have similar telephone registries "do not call lists" >the above site and others can also be used to report scam calls

entry.title: /g/ Technology: CHINA SAVES!
entry.content: Last month, we learned that US company Corsair purchased Chinese RAM at $150 (3 times lower than market value) to keep prices low for American consumers. Recently, in June, it's been found that Dell and HP has also began making purchases of cheap Chinese RAM to put into their devices for Americans. Rejoice! China saved tech! China saved gaming!

entry.title: /news/ News: Grooming Gang Inquiry Released: It's Worse Than you Think
entry.content: > Thread theme: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1CG Mk_roNaE https://www.msn.com/en-in/lifestyle /style/250-000-white-girls-abused-b ritish-mp-s-rape-gangs-report-alleg es-systemic-cover-up/ar-AA25SiMl British MP Rupert Lowe has released a major independent report on grooming gangs in the UK. The report has been titled called “The Rape Gang Inquiry”, came out on June 16. It is about 218 pages long and is based on survivor stories, court records, and past investigations. Lowe, who leads Restore B

entry.content: >She said she was also given an invitation to a party at Jeffrey Epstein’s residence. https://newrepublic.com/post/211989 /woman-told-fbi-donald-trump-tried- recruit-tower >A woman claimed she was approached by two “recruiters” who were scouting young women at Donald Trump’s Manhattan skyscraper to have sex with him—and also tried to lure her to a party at the home of Jeffrey Epstein. >Buried in the Department of Justice’s massive trove of files on Epstein, an interview conducted by the FBI on J

entry.title: /news/ News: After Months of War, Trump Says Iran Has Right to Nuclear Program
entry.content: https://newrepublic.com/post/212003 /trump-iran-right-nuclear-program >President Trump said Wednesday that Iran could have its own nuclear program. >“It is a little hard that when you say that somebody wants it, other people have it, other adjoining states have it, and you’re not letting them have it for purposes of electricity and things like that. It’s always a little tough. You have to use a little common sense,” Trump said at the G7 summit in France, alongside Secretary of State Marco Rubio,

entry.title: /news/ News: The USA Loses Iran War: 14 point MOU Released
entry.content: https://www.reuters.com/world/middl e-east/14-point-draft-us-iran-deal- 2026-06-17/ >1. The United States of America and the Islamic Republic of Iran and their allies in the current war, by signing this MOU (Memorandum of Understanding), declare the immediate and permanent termination of military operations on all fronts, including in Lebanon, and undertake from now on not to initiate any war or any military operation against each other, and to refrain from the threat or use of force against eac
